svg.title: CoffeeManager hybrid agent architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer structural diagram: outer shell is the hybrid agent, containing two side-by-side regions — Python core (deterministic) and OpenClaw brain (non-deterministic) — with shared data layer below and external government portals to the right.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What Python libraries should I use for the deterministic core — accounting, inventory, and POS integrations?')
sendPrompt('How should I structure the OpenClaw soul.md system prompt and skill files for VMI portal navigation?')
sendPrompt('What should I store in memory.sqlite — what tables and fields does the agent need for long-term memory?')
sendPrompt('What should main.py contain — how does it bootstrap both the Python core and the OpenClaw agent?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenClaw authenticate and navigate the VMI i.MAS portal safely without storing credentials in plaintext?')
sendPrompt('What is the Sodra draudejai portal flow for submitting a 1-SD draft — what fields does the agent need to fill?')
sendPrompt('How should the Telegram notification webhook be set up to alert the owner on critical events?')
